description: Cold-blooded reptilian hunters thinking in terms of survival, not sentiment or morality.
subraces: Marsh-dwelling ambushers crafting weapons from bone and vanishing beneath murky water.
Sun-baked survivors conserving water, burrowing into sand, and hunting at dusk.
Canopy stalkers with vivid scales using blowguns and camouflage to lethal effect.
Towering, dark-scaled brutes serving as shock troops and commanding through sheer size.
Tiny, chameleon-skinned infiltrators whose venomous bite belies their small stature.
